MC in/out62.5% → 45–50%
Throughput20 t/h · 600mm
Monthly8,262 t FW
ParticleD90 ≤ 2mm
Building15m × 35m × 10m
Installed~115 kW
OPDC · S1B
MC in/out70–75% → 60–62%
MC floor≥40% CLASS A
Throughput5 t/h · 500mm
Monthly1,256 t FW
Dwell≥24hr · pH 8–9
Building15m × 35m × 10m
POS · S1A
MC in/out82% → 65%
Throughput1.5 t/h (20 hr/d)
Daily30 t/day FW
Sludge tankT-SLD-101 SS304
DecanterDCN-POS-01 +2.5m
Building12m × 18m × 6m
3-Stream NPK · 60 TPH
N total582 kg/day
P total197 kg/day
K total930 kg/day
N convN × 6.25
P convP × 2.29 → P₂O₅
Derate65% nameplate
Hard Guardrails — Non-Negotiable
OPDC press MC ≥ 40% — Math.max(40, reading)
Hammer mills: spring isolation only — never rigid
Oversize always → hammer mill (not shredder)
Press water → POME pond only — never substrate
POS pit: epoxy RC — NOT SS316L lining
POS: no large liquid storage — near-continuous
Baghouse: parallel unit — duct-fed, not in series
Centrate → POME pond — never to substrate
OPDC dwell ≥24hr + pH 8.0–9.0 before S2
